hook.summary: A Greek-themed slot machine intro with a 'POV' hook and a massive chip offer.
hook.visual_action: The 'God of Sky II' slot logo is displayed prominently over a casino background, transitioning into active gameplay with lightning effects.
hook.text_overlay: POV: YOU JUST FOUND YOUR FAVORITE ROOM TO PLAY. NEW USERS GET 50,000,000 FREE CHIPS
hook.voiceover_transcript: You just found your favorite room to play. New users get...

scene_flow: Greek-themed slot machine intro with 'POV' text and '50M free chips' offer.
Fast-paced gameplay showing lightning strikes and symbols aligning on the reels.
Massive jackpot win with a rapidly increasing counter and a screen-filling coin explosion.
Final screen displaying the Huuuge Casino brand and a carousel of available slot games.
on_screen_text: POV: YOU JUST FOUND YOUR FAVORITE ROOM TO PLAY
audience_proxy: Adults 35+ who enjoy social casino games and the thrill of high-stakes slot machines.
